rulings.Case Title: ANNETTE HORNSBY VS. NEW CENTURY MORTGAGE CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Leave To File 2nd Amended Compl; Memo Of Pts And Auth In Support Of Mtn
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 24, 2013, line 1. PLAINTIFF ANNETTE HORNSBY's Motion For Leave To File 2nd Amended Complaint GRANTED. Plaintiff may file Second Amended Complaint naming only Victor Li as Doe defendant. Plaintiff shall file her Second Amended Complaint no later than September 27, 2013 by 4 p.m. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: DOROTHY DOMINIQUE VS. NAOMI SANDERS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn To Dismiss, Motion To Dismiss For Failure To Join Necessary Parties
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 24, 2013, line 2. DEFENDANT NAOMI SANDERS' Motion To Dismiss For Failure To Join Necessary Parties Hearing Required to address Plaintiff's conditional non-opposition. Plaintiff is ordered to provide courtesy copy of its non-opposition to department 501 no later than 9 a.m. on September 24, 2013. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: ALCIDES VALLADARES PERLA VS. DMG ASET MANAGEMENT LLC et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 24, 2013, line 3. DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT Continued to October 24, 2013. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C and provide courtesy copy of the operative complaint to Department 501 no later than October 4, 2013 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: ANTONIO AMADO VAZ VS. TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Reconsider Udge Harry Dorfman'S Tentative Ruling Of 7/22/13
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 24, 2013, line 4. PLAINTIFF ANTONIO AMADO VAZ' Motion To Reconsider Judge Harry Dorfman's Tentative Ruling Of 7/22/13 DENIED as follows: (1) as to Motion for Reconsideration of the ruling regarding Motion to Strike First Amended Complaint, Plaintiff failed to sustain burden under CCP 1008, no new law, facts or circumstances presented; and (2) as to Motion for Reconsideration of the ruling regarding Demurrer to the First Amended Complaint, it is moot, Second Amended Complaint filed on August 21, 2013. See County of Santa Clara v. Atlantic Richfield Co. (2006) 137 CA4th 292, 312. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: SHELDON FONG VS. EAST WEST BANK
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 24, 2013, line 5. DEFENDANT EAST WEST BANK's DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT Hearing Required. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: SHELDON FONG VS. EAST WEST BANK
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 24, 2013, line 5. DEFENDANT EAST WEST BANK's MOTION TO STRIKE 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT Hearing Required. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: LIANG, JOSEPH (AKA) KIAN JOE LIANG VS. THIAT JOE LIANG et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Defts Motion For Order Setting Aside The Default
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 24, 2013, line 6. DEFENDANT THIAT LIANG and SRI UTAN's Motion For Order Setting Aside The Default DENIED. Defendants failed to sustain their burden to overcome rebuttable presumption of proper service by a registered process server. Moving papers and Mr. Liang's declaration do not address the alleged service on April 26, 2013. Mrs. Utan did not file a declaration. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: JOSEPH HENRY WATKINS VS. JOSEPH J. ANGELESCO et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 24, 2013, line 7. DEFENDANT JOSEPH ANGELESCO's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENIED, Defendant failed to show that Plaintiff's legal right to possession was terminated by the criminal proceeding and there is a triable issue of fact as to Defendant's reasonable belief of abandonment in light of Plaintiff's participation in the unlawful detainer actions. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: JOSEPH CHUNG VS. BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Bank Of America, N.A. And Federal Home Loan Mortgage Corporation'S Demurrer To Plaintiff'S Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 24, 2013, line 15. Defendants Bank Of America, N.A. And Federal Home Loan Mortgage Corporation's Demurrer To Plaintiff'S Complaint Continued to October 24, 2013. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C and provide courtesy copy of the operative complaint to Department 501 no later than October 4, 2013 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: BRIAN SCHLESINGER VS. TOYNA CHIN et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 24, 2013, line 8. DEFENDANT TOYNA CHIN's MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT DENIED. No proof of service of the motion. Defendant failed to sustain burden under CCP 473.5. Defendant was served and appeared in this action on October 24, 2008. Courts records show no default/default judgment entered in this case. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: JUAN MENA VS. IVAN GUTIERREZ et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Terminating Sanction Of Entry Of Default Judgment And For Monetary Sanctions Against Def Ivan Gutierrez
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 24, 2013, line 9. PLAINTIFF JUAN MENA's Motion For Terminating Sanction Of Entry Of Default Judgment And For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant Ivan Gutierrez Hearing Required. Moving party is ordered to provide a file endorsed copy of the Proof of Service of Motion for Terminating Sanctions. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: CHRISTOPHER J. COSTELLO VS. REBECCA JEAN ALONZI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Further Response To Requests For Production Of Documents And Imposing Monetary Sanctions Against Defts And Their Attorney
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 24, 2013, line 10. PLAINTIFF CHRISTOPHER COSTELLO's Motion For Order Compelling Further Response To Requests For Production Of Documents And Imposing Monetary Sanctions Against Defendants And Their Attorney GRANTED as follows (1) Defendants shall provide complete responses and produce all responsive documents, indicating which document is responsive to which request as to Requests for Production 1-7, 9-23, and 27-31, within 5 days of notice of entry of order; (2) to the extent Defendants assert responsive documents are covered by privilege a "privilege log" shall be produced within 5 days of notice of entry of order; (3) Defendants and their counsel are ordered to pay $1,885 to Plaintiff's counsel within 5 days of notice of entry of order. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: JAGDISH DAYAL VS. TIFFANY HOPPER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 24, 2013, line 11. DEFENDANT TIFFANY HOPPER's Motion To Set Aside Default Judgment GRANTED subject to posting of $3,332 with the Court no later than September 24, 2013 by 4 p.m. Settlement conference is set for September 26, 2013 at 1:30 p.m. in Department 501 and jury trial is set for September 30, 2013 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 501. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: LAI KING QUAN PROPERTIES, LLC VS. DOMINIC BABAOYE et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 24, 2013, line 12. DEFENDANT DOMINIC BABAOYE's MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT Hearing Required. Defendant, Fu Rong Wu and William Quan are ordered to be present. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: 755 O'FARRELL STREET, LLC VS. KEVIN TODD et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 24, 2013, line 14. DEFENDANT KEVIN TODD's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND GRANTED is granted subject to (1) filing an answer no later than September 24, 2013 by 4:00p.m.; (2) posting $272 (September rent) with the Court no later than September 24, 2013 by 4:00 p.m.; and (3) posting $150 (costs) with the Court no later than September 24, 2013. Costs posting should be remitted by the Clerk of the Court to Plaintiff upon request forthwith. = (501/HMD)
